---
title: "DESeq2 three-way DE — full QC + per-contrast outputs (updated)"
author: "Galen O'Shea-Stone"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date())`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
set.seed(666)

# ---- Configuration -----------------------------------------------------------
output_dir    <- "deseq2_outputs"
counts_file   <- "redo.ensembl.stranded.counts.renamed.txt"  # raw counts (tab-delim)
metadata_file <- "sample_metadata.csv"                               # must contain column 'condition'
ref_level     <- "controlF"                                          # default reference level
filter_mode   <- "strict"   # "legacy" (= ≥1 read anywhere) or "strict" (= ≥10 reads in ≥3 samples)
use_rlog      <- FALSE      # if TRUE use rlog; else VST
run_lrt       <- TRUE       # optional likelihood ratio test
run_gsea      <- TRUE       # run GO/KEGG GSEA per contrast
shrink_method <- "apeglm"   # "apeglm" (default, highest fidelity) or "ashr" (shrinks contrasts w/o refits)

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)


if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

core_pkgs <- c(
  "DESeq2","apeglm","ashr","AnnotationDbi","org.Gg.eg.db",
  "clusterProfiler","enrichplot","pathview"
)
qc_pkgs   <- c("ggplot2","pheatmap","vsn")
para_pkgs <- c("BiocParallel")

for (pkg in c(core_pkgs, qc_pkgs, para_pkgs)) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) BiocManager::install(pkg, ask = FALSE)
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(pkg, character.only = TRUE))
}

# Parallel (portable)
if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
  BiocParallel::register(BiocParallel::SnowParam(workers = 4))
} else {
  BiocParallel::register(BiocParallel::MulticoreParam(workers = 4))
}

# counts
Expression <- read.delim(counts_file, check.names = FALSE)
stopifnot("Geneid" %in% colnames(Expression))
rownames(Expression) <- Expression$Geneid
cts <- as.matrix(Expression[, setdiff(colnames(Expression), "Geneid")])
storage.mode(cts) <- "integer"

# metadata
coldata <- read.csv(metadata_file, row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
stopifnot("condition" %in% colnames(coldata))
stopifnot(identical(colnames(cts), rownames(coldata)))

# ensure expected levels & set reference
coldata$condition <- factor(coldata$condition)
if (!ref_level %in% levels(coldata$condition)) {
  stop(paste("ref_level", ref_level, "is not present in metadata$condition"))
}
coldata$condition <- relevel(coldata$condition, ref = ref_level)

# DESeq2 dataset
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = cts, colData = coldata, design = ~ condition)

# gene filter
if (tolower(filter_mode) == "legacy") {
  keep <- rowSums(counts(dds) > 0) > 0
} else {
  keep <- rowSums(counts(dds) >= 10) >= 3
}
dds <- dds[keep, ]


dds <- DESeq(dds, parallel = TRUE)
coef_names <- resultsNames(dds)

if (run_lrt) {
  dds_lrt <- DESeq(dds, test = "LRT", reduced = ~1, parallel = TRUE)
  res_lrt <- results(dds_lrt)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(res_lrt), file.path(output_dir, "LRT_condition_vs_null.csv"))
}
vsd_fun <- if (use_rlog) rlog else vst
vsd <- vsd_fun(dds, blind = FALSE)

# PCA
p_pca <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "condition") + ggtitle("PCA — variance-stabilised counts")
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "QC_PCA_vst_or_rlog.pdf"), p_pca, width = 6.5, height = 5)

# Size factors
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "QC_size_factors.pdf"));  barplot(sizeFactors(dds), las=2, ylab="sizeFactor", main="Size factors"); dev.off()

# Dispersion trend
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "QC_dispersion_trend.pdf")); plotDispEsts(dds); dev.off()

# Sample distance heatmap
mat <- as.matrix(dist(t(assay(vsd))))
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "QC_sample_distance_heatmap.pdf"))
pheatmap(mat, clustering_distance_rows="euclidean", clustering_distance_cols="euclidean",
         main = "Sample–sample distance (VST/rlog)")
dev.off()

# Cook's distance (safe log)
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "QC_cooks_distance_boxplot.pdf"))
boxplot(log10(assays(dds)[["cooks"]] + 1e-8), range=0, outline=FALSE, las=2,
        ylab="log10 Cook's distance", main="Influential observations")
dev.off()

# mean–SD plot
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "QC_meanSD_vst_or_rlog.pdf")); vsn::meanSdPlot(assay(vsd)); dev.off()

# p-value histogram (use first available coefficient)
first_coef <- grep("^condition_", coef_names, value = TRUE)[1]
if (!is.na(first_coef)) {
  res_tmp <- results(dds, name = first_coef, parallel = TRUE)
  pdf(file.path(output_dir, "QC_pvalue_histogram.pdf"))
  hist(res_tmp$pvalue, breaks = 50, col = "grey", main = paste("P-value distribution —", first_coef), xlab = "p-value")
  dev.off()
}

# Make a filesystem-safe label
labelize <- function(a, b) gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_", paste0(a, "_vs_", b))

# Shrink LFCs for a contrast:
# - apeglm: uses a named coef; relevels & refits automatically if needed
# - ashr: can shrink arbitrary contrasts without refit
shrink_contrast <- function(dds, contrast_vec, shrink_method = "apeglm") {
  grp1 <- contrast_vec[2]; grp0 <- contrast_vec[3]
  if (tolower(shrink_method) == "ashr") {
    return(lfcShrink(dds, contrast = contrast_vec, type = "ashr", parallel = TRUE))
  } else {
    # apeglm path: try within current reference
    cur_ref <- levels(dds$condition)[1]
    coef_name <- paste0("condition_", grp1, "_vs_", grp0)
    if (grp0 == cur_ref && coef_name %in% resultsNames(dds)) {
      return(lfcShrink(dds, coef = coef_name, type = "apeglm", parallel = TRUE))
    } else {
      # relevel & refit to expose coef
      dds2 <- dds
      dds2$condition <- relevel(dds2$condition, ref = grp0)
      dds2 <- DESeq(dds2, parallel = TRUE)
      coef_name2 <- paste0("condition_", grp1, "_vs_", grp0)
      if (!(coef_name2 %in% resultsNames(dds2))) stop("Desired coefficient not found after releveling.")
      return(lfcShrink(dds2, coef = coef_name2, type = "apeglm", parallel = TRUE))
    }
  }
}

# Export per-contrast outputs (MA, volcano, CSV with raw+shrunken, sig counts).
run_contrast <- function(dds, group1, group0, do_gsea = TRUE, shrink_method = "apeglm") {
  lbl <- labelize(group1, group0)
  contrast_vec <- c("condition", group1, group0)
  # Raw results (Wald)
  res_raw <- results(dds, contrast = contrast_vec, parallel = TRUE)
  res_df  <- as.data.frame(res_raw)

  # Shrunken LFCs
  res_shr <- tryCatch(shrink_contrast(dds, contrast_vec, shrink_method = shrink_method),
                      error = function(e) { message("Shrinkage failed: ", e$message); NULL })

  # Compose export table
  if (!is.null(res_shr)) {
    out <- data.frame(
      baseMean        = res_raw$baseMean,
      log2FC          = res_raw$log2FoldChange,
      log2FC_shrunken = res_shr$log2FoldChange,
      lfcSE_shrunken  = res_shr$lfcSE,
      stat            = res_raw$stat,
      pvalue          = res_raw$pvalue,
      padj            = res_raw$padj,
      row.names       = rownames(res_raw)
    )
  } else {
    out <- data.frame(
      baseMean = res_raw$baseMean,
      log2FC   = res_raw$log2FoldChange,
      stat     = res_raw$stat,
      pvalue   = res_raw$pvalue,
      padj     = res_raw$padj,
      row.names = rownames(res_raw)
    )
  }
  write.csv(out, file.path(output_dir, paste0("DESeq2_", lbl, ".csv")))

  # Sig counts (FDR < 0.05)
  sig <- !is.na(res_raw$padj) & res_raw$padj < 0.05
  n_up   <- sum(sig & res_raw$log2FoldChange > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_down <- sum(sig & res_raw$log2FoldChange < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  write.table(data.frame(up = n_up, down = n_down),
              file = file.path(output_dir, paste0("sig_gene_counts_", lbl, ".txt")),
              sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE)

  # MA plot
  pdf(file.path(output_dir, paste0("MA_", lbl, ".pdf"))); plotMA(res_raw, ylim = c(-5,5)); dev.off()

  # Volcano (safe transforms)
  vdf <- transform(res_df,
                   neglog10padj = -log10(pmin(padj, 1)),
                   log2FC       = log2FoldChange)
  vdf <- vdf[is.finite(vdf$neglog10padj) & is.finite(vdf$log2FC), ]
  pdf(file.path(output_dir, paste0("volcano_", lbl, ".pdf")))
  plot(vdf$log2FC, vdf$neglog10padj, pch = 20,
       xlab = "log2 fold-change", ylab = "-log10(FDR)",
       main = paste0("Volcano — ", group1, " vs ", group0))
  abline(h = -log10(0.05), lty = 2)
  dev.off()

  # GSEA (rank by Wald statistic, BH-adjusted)
  if (do_gsea) {
    ranked <- res_raw$stat; names(ranked) <- rownames(res_raw)
    ranked <- sort(ranked[!is.na(ranked)], decreasing = TRUE)

    # GO GSEA (ENSEMBL keys assumed in rownames)
    gse_go <- tryCatch(
      gseGO(geneList = ranked, keyType = "ENSEMBL", ont = "ALL",
            OrgDb = org.Gg.eg.db, nPerm = 10000,
            minGSSize = 3, maxGSSize = 800,
            pvalueCutoff = 0.05, pAdjustMethod = "BH", verbose = FALSE),
      error = function(e) { message("gseGO failed: ", e$message); NULL }
    )
    if (!is.null(gse_go) && nrow(as.data.frame(gse_go)) > 0) {
      pdf(file.path(output_dir, paste0("GO_GSEA_dotplot_", lbl, ".pdf")))
      print(dotplot(gse_go, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") + facet_grid(. ~ .sign))
      dev.off()
    }

    # KEGG GSEA (map ENSEMBL -> ENTREZ)
    ids <- tryCatch(
      bitr(names(ranked), fromType = "ENSEMBL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Gg.eg.db),
      error = function(e) { message("bitr failed: ", e$message); NULL }
    )
    if (!is.null(ids) && nrow(ids) > 0) {
      ids <- ids[!duplicated(ids$ENTREZID), ]
      rk2 <- ranked[ids$ENSEMBL]; names(rk2) <- as.character(ids$ENTREZID)
      rk2 <- sort(rk2[!is.na(rk2)], decreasing = TRUE)

      kk2 <- tryCatch(
        gseKEGG(geneList = rk2, organism = "gga", keyType = "ncbi-geneid",
                minGSSize = 3, maxGSSize = 800,
                pvalueCutoff = 0.05, pAdjustMethod = "BH"),
        error = function(e) { message("gseKEGG failed: ", e$message); NULL }
      )
      if (!is.null(kk2) && nrow(as.data.frame(kk2)) > 0) {
        pdf(file.path(output_dir, paste0("KEGG_GSEA_dotplot_", lbl, ".pdf")))
        print(dotplot(kk2, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") + facet_grid(. ~ .sign))
        dev.off()
      }
    }
  }
}
# You can change the order of these or add more if needed
all_levels <- levels(dds$condition)
stopifnot(all(c("experimental","controlF","controlP") %in% all_levels))

run_contrast(dds, "experimental", "controlF", do_gsea = run_gsea, shrink_method = shrink_method)
run_contrast(dds, "experimental", "controlP", do_gsea = run_gsea, shrink_method = shrink_method)
run_contrast(dds, "controlF",     "controlP", do_gsea = run_gsea, shrink_method = shrink_method)

write.csv(counts(dds, normalized = TRUE), file.path(output_dir, "normalized_counts.csv"))
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), file.path(output_dir, "sessionInfo.txt"))

```
